label: Wetlab Validation
description: Design and generate a wetlab experimental plan to validate the safety and functional claims of the proposed formulation.

defaultInputs.name: Formulation
defaultInputs.tooltip: Final formulation data to design the validation study around.

defaultOutputs.name: Plan ID
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Unique identifier for the generated experimental plan.

defaultOutputs.name: Plan Name
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Descriptive name of the experimental plan.

defaultOutputs.name: Plan Type
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Format of the output plan document (e.g. PDF, spreadsheet).

defaultOutputs.name: Reference URL
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Link to the generated experimental plan document.

configSchema.label: Administration
configSchema.tooltip: Route of administration for the product being validated.

configSchema.label: Daily Intake Frequency
configSchema.tooltip: How many times per day the product is consumed (e.g. 'Once daily with meal', '2× per day').

configSchema.label: Serving Size
configSchema.tooltip: Amount consumed per serving, including unit (e.g. '30 g', '2 capsules', '250 mL').

configSchema.label: Intent
configSchema.tooltip: Intended purpose of the product being validated.

configSchema.label: Target Population
configSchema.tooltip: The intended consumer group for whom the validation study is designed.

configSchema.label: Purpose of Testing
configSchema.tooltip: Select all objectives this wetlab study is designed to address.
